nasb.text: Then the Lord said to Moses, “Speak to the priests, the sons of Aaron, and say to them: ‘No one shall defile himself for a dead person among his people,

esv.text: And the Lord said to Moses, “Speak to the priests, the sons of Aaron, and say to them, No one shall make himself unclean for the dead among his people,

cnv.text: 耶和華對摩西說：“你要告訴亞倫子孫作祭司的，對他們說：祭司不可在自己的族人中因死人玷污自己，

ccb.text: 耶和华对摩西说：“你把以下条例告诉祭司——亚伦的子孙。 “祭司不可因接触死去的族人而使自己不洁净，
